headline: Waters Corp (WAT) Expands After BD Diagnostic Solutions Acquisition
summary: Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) ranks among the recent spin-off companies that hedge funds are piling into. Waters Corporation (NYSE:WAT) discussed its strategy at the TD Cowen 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 2, with CEO Udit Batra emphasizing development ambitions and integration efforts following the acquisition of BD Diagnostic Solutions. The company anticipates 6.25% organic […]
